Hero.tagline: While others read reports, you get answers.
Hero.youGetFootnote: An automated report shows data — PROVIN adds cross-checks, listing review, and expert interpretation.
Hero.confidenceBody: Your chosen car’s data, model-specific risks, and whether the price makes sense are reviewed manually so nothing important slips past you. You receive a grounded, objective conclusion with full clarity for a safe decision.
Hero.autoRecordsFootnote: * May apply only to certain manufacturers
youGetBullets: A consolidated view from several paid databases
